meaning: vi.(只用动词不定式)走开int.走开!滚蛋!
examples: Why do you hang down your head and look so lonely and woe-begone?
I said to myself. 'Take warning and begone!
My wife, who has impeccable taste, loves me in the top hat and commented that it was both "handsome" and "rakish" upon me. (Did I mention it increased my height by five inches too?) Critics, begone!
